title: I AM LIMITLESS Conference 2022
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
I AM LIMITLESS Conference 2022
What is the 2022 I AM LIMITLESS Conference?
The I AM LIMITLESS Conference is an annual event hosted by the Center for Career Development. For this year’s I AM LIMITLESS Conference, we had the distinct pleasure of welcoming social impact awards winners as keynote speakers and young NYU Shanghai alumni to campus to speak. Through this conference, we hope to support NYU Shanghai students to foster a service mindset in all career paths, to help draw positive inspiration from professionals, alumni, and peers, and to make an impact in our neighborhood, community, and the world.
Social Impact Talks
Fill in the "Gaps" in a Fully Loaded Life 碎片化时间里，藏着你的人生
Speaker: Joan REN, Founder of Seeding, Partner of SIG
Making Beats that Transcend Cultural Boundaries 中国曲艺和跨文化沟通
Speaker: Yuchen JIN, Founder & CEO of AlphaLink, Vice President of Wharton Club of Beijing
How Self Awareness Can Help You Stand Out From the Crowd 在提升自我认知中走向卓越
Speaker: Paula MUELLER, Founder and Master Trainer, EQwind Emotional Intelligence Institute
Starting An Entrepreneurial Career in China 看好中国机遇，扎根中国市场 —— 以色列青年创客的科技创新之旅
Speaker: Amit GAL-OR, CEO & Ownership, INNONATION
Alumni Dialogue
Stay True to Yourself: in Work and Life 在工作和生活的选择中，忠于自己
Igniting the Social Service Spirit: Turning Your Intention to Action 寓信念于行动——国际组织工作经验分享
From the World, For the World: A Journey Leading to a Sustainable Future 地球公民：从上纽出发的可持续家园之旅
Unlock Your Potential: Explore and Launch a Meaningful Career 突破自我: 在不断探索中寻找职业方向
Connecting Sustainable Development with Enduring Commercial Success 可持续发展理念：驱动未来商业的高质量发展
Social Impact Panel
Follow Your Passion to Forge Your Own Path: Journeys of Exploration of NYU Shanghai Students and Alumni to Create Social Impact
From Classroom to the Field: Faculty Panel on Creating Social Impact through Research
Community Service and Leadership Development
Schwarzman Scholars Chat
Career Exploration Session
Intern and Work in China: For international students
Career Lab Launch! New Walk-in Type to Build Personalized Bridge Between You and Online Career Resources
Organization Info Session/Organization Visit
Organization Info Session: Link Accessibility
Career Fair
2022 Spring Online Job Board (China Market)
Learn more about I AM LIMITLESS CONFERENCE
7th Annual ‘I AM LIMITLESS’ Conference Highlights Careers in Social Impact

I AM LIMITLESS Conference 2020
